Raised when a deterministic CALL tool raises an exception.     Catchable via WHE
Raised when the requested LLM or multimodal model cannot be reached.     Covers:
Raised when a required input file (image, audio, video) does not exist.
Raised when a target media format is not supported by the codec layer.

Raised when attempting to extract audio from a video that has no audio stream.
Raised when a requested video timestamp exceeds the video duration.
Apply temporary parameter overrides for a RETRY attempt.
Clear temporary overrides after a successful statement execution.
Execute SPL 2.0 PROMPT and WORKFLOW statements.
Register a Python callable as a CALL-able tool. Returns self for chaining.

Raise BudgetExceeded if this workflow has hit the configured safety caps.
Lazily initialise the FAISS vector store on first access.
Execute all statements in an analyzed program.
Execute a CTE's nested PROMPT as a sub-query and return the result text.
Resolve a rag_query step by searching the vector store.
Evaluate a generate-clause argument against a plain dict context.
Execute a list of body statements.
